016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonCreator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;
020import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
021import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
022
023import java.math.BigDecimal;
024import java.time.Instant;
025import java.util.ArrayList;
026import java.util.List;
027
028/**
029 * BlockInfo POJO returned by GetBlockInfo
030 */
031// "strippedsize" property added (present in Bitcoin 0.13)
032public class BlockInfo {
033    public enum IncludeTxFlag {
034        NO,         // Don't include transactions
035        IDONLY,     // Only include the Transaction ID/hash
036        YES         // Include transactions (in the format of getrawtransaction RPC)
037    }
038    public final Sha256Hash hash;
039    public final int confirmations;
040    public final int size;
041    public final int height;
042    public final int version;
043    public final Sha256Hash merkleroot;
044    private final int nTx;
045    public final Sha256HashList tx;
046    public final Instant time;
047    public final long nonce;
048    public final String bits;
049    public final BigDecimal difficulty;
050    public final String chainwork;
051    public final Sha256Hash previousblockhash;
052    public final Sha256Hash nextblockhash;
053
054    public BlockInfo(@JsonProperty("hash")              Sha256Hash hash,
055                     @JsonProperty("confirmations")     int confirmations,
056                     @JsonProperty("size")              int size,
057                     @JsonProperty("height")            int height,
058                     @JsonProperty("version")           int version,
059                     @JsonProperty("merkleroot")        Sha256Hash merkleroot,
060                     @JsonProperty("nTx")               int nTx,
061                     @JsonProperty("tx")                Sha256HashList tx,
062                     @JsonProperty("time")              long time,
063                     @JsonProperty("nonce")             long nonce,
064                     @JsonProperty("bits")              String bits,
065                     @JsonProperty("difficulty")        BigDecimal difficulty,
066                     @JsonProperty("chainwork")         String chainwork,
067                     @JsonProperty("previousblockhash") Sha256Hash previousblockhash,
068                     @JsonProperty("nextblockhash")     Sha256Hash nextblockhash) {
069        this.hash = hash;
070        this.confirmations = confirmations;
071        this.size = size;
072        this.height = height;
073        this.version = version;
074        this.merkleroot = merkleroot;
075        this.nTx = nTx;
076        this.tx = tx;
077        this.time = Instant.ofEpochSecond(time);
078        this.nonce = nonce;
079        this.bits = bits;
080        this.difficulty = difficulty;
081        this.chainwork = chainwork;
082        this.previousblockhash = previousblockhash;
083        this.nextblockhash = nextblockhash;
084    }
085
086    public static class Sha256HashList extends ArrayList<Sha256Hash> {
087        @JsonCreator
088        public Sha256HashList(List<Sha256Hash> collection) {
089            super(collection);
090        }
091    }
092
093    public Sha256Hash getHash() {
094        return hash;
095    }
096
097    public int getConfirmations() {
098        return confirmations;
099    }
100
101    public int getSize() {
102        return size;
103    }
104
105    public int getHeight() {
106        return height;
107    }
108
109    public int getVersion() {
110        return version;
111    }
112
113    public Sha256Hash getMerkleroot() {
114        return merkleroot;
115    }
116
117    public int getNTx() {
118        return nTx;
119    }
120
121    public Sha256HashList getTx() {
122        return tx;
123    }
124
125    public Instant getTime() {
126        return time;
127    }
128
129    public long getNonce() {
130        return nonce;
131    }
132
133    public String getBits() {
134        return bits;
135    }
136
137    public BigDecimal getDifficulty() {
138        return difficulty;
139    }
140
141    public String getChainwork() {
142        return chainwork;
143    }
144
145    public Sha256Hash getPreviousblockhash() {
146        return previousblockhash;
147    }
148
149    public Sha256Hash getNextblockhash() {
150        return nextblockhash;
151    }
152}
